name: Laili Novita Sari
description: A fresh graduate of the Diploma III (D3) Electronics Engineering Program, Department of Electrical Engineering, at Politeknik Negeri Semarang. Have a strong interest in embedded systems, Internet of Things (IoT), industrial automation, control systems, and electronic circuit design. Throughout my academic journey, Have been involved in various engineering projects, including IoT-based smart devices, PID control systems, industrial electrical panels, PCB design, and microcontroller programming using Arduino and ESP32 platforms. These experiences have strengthened my technical skills in hardware integration, system monitoring, troubleshooting, and automation technologies. A motivated, adaptable, and detail-oriented individual who is eager to learn new technologies and contribute to innovative engineering solutions. Seeking opportunities to apply my knowledge and skills in electronics, automation, and industrial technology while continuing to grow professionally.
